bird.name: Hawaiian coot
bird.summary: The ʻAlae keʻokeʻo (Fulica alai), also known as the Hawaiian coot in English, is a bird in the rail family, Rallidae, that is endemic to Ha…

relations.subject: Hawaiian coot
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and introduced predators such as the small Asian mongoose. The Makalawena Marsh on the Big Island of Hawaiʻi has been listed as a National Natural Landmark to preserve one of its last nesting areas
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Hawaiian coot
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and introduced predators such as the small Asian mongoose. The Makalawena Marsh on the Big Island of Hawaiʻi has been listed as a National Natural Landmark to preserve one of its last nesting areas
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
